sutta: buddha said monks these 4 aryan lineages reckoned as ancient as of long-standing as traditional primeval pure and unadulterated now as then are not confounded nor shall they be are not despised by discerning recluses and brahmanas but other 4 here in monks a monk is content with any sort of ropes and speaks in praise of such content for the sake of getting ropes he resorts not to unseemly and unbecoming conduct here he gets not robes he is not dismayed therein and if he does get them he is free from the bond of selfishness of greed of craving for them seeing the danger therein and skills in the escape therefrom he makes use of them yet does he not exalt himself because of his content with any sort of ropes nor does he disparage others who are not content who so who so monks is killed herein not slothful but mindful and hateful this monk is 1 who stands firm in the primeval ancient aryan lineage then again among is content with any sort of arms food and speaks in praise of such content for the sake of getting arms food he resorts not to what is unseemly and unbecoming if he gets not harm's food he is not dismayed there at and if he does get it he is free from the bond of selfishness of greed of craving for it seeing the danger therein and skill in the escape therefrom he makes use of it yet does he not exalt himself because of his content with any sort of arms food nor does he disparage others who are not content who so monks is killed hearing this monk is 1 who stands firm in the primeval ancient aryan lineage then again a monk is content with any sort of lodging and speaks in praise of such content for the sake of getting lodging he resorts not etc etc if he gets not lodging he is not dismayed there at whoso monks is kill hearing he stands firm in the arena lineage etc once more monks among the lies in letting go abandoning so delighting he delights in developing yet because of his delight in the 1 abandoning and the other developing he exalts not himself because of that delight nor does he disparage others who did who delights not therein who so monks is killed here in not slothful but mindful and hateful this monk is 1 who stands firm in the primeval ancient aryan lineage these monks are the 4 aryan lineages reckon as ancient as of long-standing as traditional primeval pure and unadulterated now as then which are not confounded nor shall be are not despised by discerning recluses and brahmins moreover monks possess of these 4 aryan lineages whether among dwell in the east or the west north or south wherever he may dwell he masters discontent and content amongst he is a sage and listen which is concerned more with monks and telling the monks not to be too concerned with ropes and the requisites and the ropes the food and the lodgings to be content with whatever among it and the last 1 is letting go abandoning which occurs among practices in stages and eventually supposed to let go of the self the ego these 4 factors
